selectorHitRate.interpretation: No structural drift on CSS selectors. All 8 selectors return results. 2 cards out of 309 lack data-product-name (likely non-product tiles in carousel).

domPathFingerprint.domPath: div.primary > div.layout--mini-template > div.module-template > div.carousel-template > div.slick-list > div.slick-track > div.slick-slide > div.default-product-tile
domPathFingerprint.interpretation: Cards are NOT inside an iframe. The first card found is in a carousel (slick-slide), but grid cards follow the same .default-product-tile pattern. No shadow DOM detected.

elementCountStability.interpretation: Initial load of 70 cards is within expected range (30-70). Total displayed is 1,564 deals which matches baseline. Only 309 loaded so far (Load More not fully clicked).

deviations.htmlSizeKB: SLIGHTLY ABOVE BASELINE (1620KB vs 300-1500KB) - expected with partially loaded products
deviations.scriptCount: ABOVE BASELINE (95 vs 30-60) - possible new analytics/tracking scripts added
deviations.stylesheetCount: BELOW BASELINE (4 vs 5-15) - possible CSS consolidation, not a concern
deviations.iframeCount: ABOVE BASELINE (20 vs 8-15) - additional tracking/ad iframes

pageWeightFingerprint.interpretation: Script count (95) and iframe count (20) are above baseline. This suggests additional third-party scripts were added but does NOT indicate a framework/platform change. No 3x deviation in any metric.

gridView.actual: View the flyer in grid view ... Grid View
gridView.note: Label text includes aria/screen-reader text but 'Grid View' is still present

completeFlyer.note: Element changed from <a> to <button>. The class 'complete-flyer' is still present but the tag changed. Skill selector 'a.complete-flyer' will NOT match. Must update to 'button.complete-flyer' or '.complete-flyer'.

acceptCookies.actual: NOT FOUND (already accepted in previous session)
acceptCookies.note: Cookie banner was already dismissed. Cannot verify label text.

buttonLabelDrift.interpretation: DRIFT: Complete Flyer tab changed from <a> to <button>. The skill's 'a.complete-flyer' selector will fail. Fallback text-match in the skill will still work. Recommend updating selector to '.complete-flyer' (tag-agnostic).

httpStatusSoft404.interpretation: No error signals detected. Page title confirms valid flyer page.

redirectTracking.interpretation: URL redirected from /en/flyer to /en/online-grocery/flyer with filter parameters. This is a route change. The skill's documented URL (metro.ca/en/flyer) still works via redirect, but the canonical path has changed. The query params and hash suggest the Grid View + Complete Flyer state is now URL-encoded.

temporalCoherence.dateFound: NO DATE FOUND (expected -- Metro grid view lacks visible dates)
temporalCoherence.interpretation: As expected, Metro's grid view does not display flyer dates. This is normal behavior documented in the baseline.

gridViewSwitch.interpretation: Grid view is active. Flipp flipbook iframe is not visible.

completeFlyer.interpretation: Complete Flyer tab is active and showing products.

loadMoreStatus.interpretation: Load More has not been fully clicked (309 of 1564 loaded). This is expected for drift detection -- we only need initial load to verify selectors.

tabStructureDrift.interpretation: Tab structure is mixed: 'My Suggestions' is an <a> tag while 'Complete Flyer' and 'My Coupons' are <button> tags. This is inconsistent but functional.

dataAttributeIntegrity.interpretation: All data attributes are present at expected rates. Brand at 94% (some unbranded produce items expected). Discount percent at 92% (some items without explicit discounts).

moiLoyaltyPoints.interpretation: Moi loyalty points selector still works. 42 items have point offers.

contentVolume.interpretation: 1,564 deals is within the expected range for Metro's Complete Flyer tab.
